x-enumeration-literals.name: Borrower
x-enumeration-literals.description: Borrower / Customer: The person receives the credit and is obligated to repay it under agreed terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Lender
x-enumeration-literals.description: Lender / Financial Institution: The bank or organization that provides the credit and sets the terms, conditions, and pricing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Co-borrower
x-enumeration-literals.description: Co-borrower / Joint Applicant: A person who applies for and shares responsibility for repaying the credit alongside the primary borrower.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Guarantor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Guarantor: A person agrees to repay the credit if the borrower defaults.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Risk Department
x-enumeration-literals.description: Credit Risk Department / Underwriter: The team that assesses the borrowers creditworthiness and decides whether to approve the credit and under what conditions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Relationship Manager
x-enumeration-literals.description: Relationship Manager / Account Officer: Bank staff who manage the customer relationship and facilitate the credit application and servicing process.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Authority
x-enumeration-literals.description: Regulatory Authority: Government or official bodies that oversee credit practices to ensure legal and regulatory compliance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Agency
x-enumeration-literals.description: Credit Bureau / Credit Agency: Organizations that provide credit history and scoring information used to assess the borrowers risk.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Provider
x-enumeration-literals.description: Collateral Provider: A person pledges assets as security for the credit (may be the borrower or a third party).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Legal Entity
x-enumeration-literals.description: Legal / Documentation Entity: Internal or external legal parties responsible for drafting, reviewing, and enforcing credit agreements.
